how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes.
session_036_completed: summarize_session_tool BUILT — River now writes her own session digest at close. Reads session_context.json (priorities) + river_build.json (today's build notes filtered by date, excluding 'Session closed' counters). Composes summary, prepends to session.json, trims to keep_last=5. Duplicate guard prevents double entries. 9 tools in river manifest. autonomous_trigger 'summarize session' added.

CANVAS LIVE AWARENESS BUILT — File drop into canvas now notifies Ethica immediately without close/reopen. _on_canvas_file_drop() calls self.on_content_change() after routing file to tab. on_content_change is wired to MainWindow._on_canvas_change() → engine.update_canvas_context(). Ethica sees filename, tab type, line count on next message. Test confirmed: Ethica named websocket_router.py, tab type, line count, and recalled session history in same response.

CANVAS CONTENT ACCESS GAP IDENTIFIED — Ethica sees canvas tab state (filename, type, line count) but not full file content. _write_canvas_context() writes first 3 lines as preview. Next session: extend preview to more lines on file drop so Ethica reads actual scroll content not just metadata.
